name: Royal Hills Golf Resort & Spa
notes: LOCATION MISMATCH: Royal Hills Golf Resort & Spa is NOT in Hua Hin — it is in Sarika, Nakhon Nayok Province, near Khao Yai National Park (a UNESCO World Heritage Site), approximately 90 km northeast of Bangkok. Address: 100/3 Moo 2, Sarika-Nangrong Road, T.Sarika, A.Mueng, Nakhon Nayok 26000. GPS: 14.3183513, 101.2751177. It was listed in the pipeline as a Hua Hin course (#10) — this appears to be a misclassification; it is a Khao Yai-region course. The only Nelson & Wright-designed course in Thailand. 18 holes + 2 spare holes added in 2018. Length: 7,034 yards (Black tees). Year opened 2002 per Golfasian. Green fees: GAD Thailand (March 2023) listed 400 THB weekday and 500 THB weekend for GAD member golfers; public/visitor rates could not be confirmed from current sources. Caddie tip minimum 400 THB. Cart complimentary per Golfasian; cart fee of 600 THB from GAD Thailand — may reflect older pricing. No driving range on-site per Golfasian. Club rental 1,500 THB, shoe rental 200 THB. Booking minimum 3 golfers, maximum 5. Booking must be made 2 days in advance. Resort includes 4-star hotel, spa, restaurants, pool. Distance from Bangkok approximately 90 km, about 1+ hour drive. Not near Hua Hin (~220 km from Hua Hin).
